records.question: What are the id and name of the museum visited most times?
records.gold_sql: SELECT t2.Museum_ID ,  t1.name FROM museum AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.Museum_ID  =  t2.Museum_ID GROUP BY t2.Museum_ID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.Museum_ID, m.Name
FROM museum m
JOIN visit v ON m.Museum_ID = v.Museum_ID
GROUP BY m.Museum_ID, m.Name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

records.question: Find all airlines that have at least 10 flights.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline HAVING count(*)  >  10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.uid, a.Airline, a.Abbreviation, a.Country
FROM airlines a
JOIN flights f ON a.uid = f.Airline
GROUP BY a.uid, a.Airline, a.Abbreviation, a.Country
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10

records.question: How many poker players are there?
records.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM poker_player
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM poker_player

records.question: For students who have pets , how many pets does each student have ? list their ids instead of names .
records.gold_sql: select count(*) ,  t1.stuid from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid group by t1.stuid
records.pred_sql: SELECT StuID, COUNT(PetID) FROM Has_Pet GROUP BY StuID

records.question: Which professionals live in a city containing the substring 'West'? List his or her role, street, city and state.
records.gold_sql: SELECT role_code ,  street ,  city ,  state FROM professionals WHERE city LIKE '%West%'
records.pred_sql: SELECT role_code, street, city, state FROM Professionals WHERE city LIKE '%West%'

records.question: What is the average horsepower of the cars before 1980?
records.gold_sql: SELECT avg(horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  <  1980;
records.pred_sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(Horsepower AS REAL)) FROM cars_data WHERE Year < 1980

records.question: How many contestants did not get voted?
records.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM contestants WHERE contestant_number NOT IN ( SELECT contestant_number FROM votes )
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONTESTANTS WHERE contestant_number NOT IN (SELECT contestant_number FROM VOTES)

records.question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING sum(T3.killed)  >  10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT b.id, b.name
FROM battle b
JOIN ship s ON s.lost_in_battle = b.id
JOIN death d ON d.caused_by_ship_id = s.id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
HAVING SUM(d.killed) > 10

records.question: What are the names of the singers who performed in a concert in 2014?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.singer_id  =  T2.singer_id JOIN concert AS T3 ON T1.concert_id  =  T3.concert_id WHERE T3.year  =  2014
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Name FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID JOIN concert AS T3 ON T1.concert_ID = T3.concert_ID WHERE T3.Year = '2014'

records.question: What is the name of the visitor who visited both a museum opened before 2009 and a museum opened after 2011?
records.gold_sql: SELECT t1.name FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id JOIN museum AS t3 ON t3.Museum_ID  =  t2.Museum_ID WHERE t3.open_year  <  2009 INTERSECT SELECT t1.name FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id JOIN museum AS t3 ON t3.Museum_ID  =  t2.Museum_ID WHERE t3.open_year  >  2011
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT v.Name
FROM visitor v
JOIN visit vs1 ON v.ID = vs1.visitor_ID
JOIN museum m1 ON vs1.Museum_ID = m1.Museum_ID AND CAST(m1.Open_Year AS INTEGER) < 2009
JOIN visit vs2 ON v.ID = vs2.visitor_ID
JOIN museum m2 ON vs2.Museum_ID = m2.Museum_ID AND CAST(m2.Open_Year AS INTEGER) > 2011

records.question: What are airlines that have some flight departing from airport 'AHD'?

WHERE T3.degree_summary_name = 'Bachelor'

records.question: What are the name and results of the battles when the bulgarian commander is not 'Boril'

records.pred_sql: SELECT name, result FROM battle WHERE bulgarian_commander <> 'Boril'

records.question: What are  the different countries with singers above age 20?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM singer WHERE age  >  20
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Country FROM singer WHERE Age > 20

records.question: Return the different names of cities that are in Asia and for which Chinese is the official language.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode JOIN city AS T3 ON T1.Code  =  T3.CountryCode WHERE T2.IsOfficial  =  'T' AND T2.Language  =  'Chinese' AND T1.Continent  =  "Asia"
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Name
FROM city c
JOIN country co ON c.CountryCode = co.Code
JOIN countrylanguage cl ON cl.CountryCode = co.Code
WHERE co.Continent = 'Asia' AND cl.Language = 'Chinese' AND cl.IsOfficial = 'T'

records.question: Find the districts in which there are both shops selling less than 3000 products and shops selling more than 10000 products.
records.gold_sql: SELECT district FROM shop WHERE Number_products  <  3000 INTERSECT SELECT district FROM shop WHERE Number_products  >  10000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT District FROM shop WHERE Number_products < 3000
INTERSECT
SELECT District FROM shop WHERE Number_products > 10000

records.question: Show the names of singers and the total sales of their songs.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Name ,  sum(T2.Sales) FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T1.Name
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Name, SUM(so.Sales) AS Total_Sales
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Singer_ID, s.Name

records.question: Find the kind of program which most number of students are enrolled in?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.degree_summary_name FROM Degree_Programs AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.degree_program_id  =  T2.degree_program_id GROUP BY T1.degree_summary_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT dp.degree_summary_name
FROM Student_Enrolment se
JOIN Degree_Programs dp ON se.degree_program_id = dp.degree_program_id
GROUP BY dp.degree_summary_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

records.question: Give the name of the student with the most likes.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT h.name
FROM Highschooler h
JOIN Likes l ON h.ID = l.liked_id
GROUP BY h.ID, h.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

records.question: Find the total number of tours for each ranking date.

records.pred_sql: SELECT ranking_date, SUM(tours) AS total_tours FROM rankings GROUP BY ranking_date

records.question: Show the document id with paragraph text 'Brazil' and 'Ireland'.

records.question: What are the names of the teachers who teach at least two courses?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN teacher AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T2.Teacher_ID GROUP BY T2.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT t.Name
FROM teacher t
JOIN course_arrange ca ON t.Teacher_ID = ca.Teacher_ID
GROUP BY t.Teacher_ID, t.Name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ca.Course_ID) >= 2

records.question: Find the production code and channel of the most recently aired cartoon .

records.question: Find the number of visitors who did not visit any museum opened after 2010.
records.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM visitor WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT t2.visitor_id FROM museum AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.Museum_ID  =  t2.Museum_ID WHERE t1.open_year  >  2010)
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitor WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT visit.visitor_ID FROM visit JOIN museum ON visit.Museum_ID = museum.Museum_ID WHERE CAST(museum.Open_Year AS INTEGER) > 2010)

records.question: What is the code of airport that has the highest number of flights?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.AirportCode FROM AIRPORTS AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.AirportCode  =  T2.DestAirport OR T1.AirportCode  =  T2.SourceAirport GROUP BY T1.AirportCode ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT AirportCode FROM (
  SELECT SourceAirport AS AirportCode FROM flights
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DestAirport AS AirportCode FROM flights
) GROUP BY AirportCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: What are the nationalities that are shared by at least two people?

records.question: Find the first name of students who have both cat and dog pets .
records.gold_sql: select t1.fname from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid join pets as t3 on t3.petid  =  t2.petid where t3.pettype  =  'cat' intersect select t1.fname from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid join pets as t3 on t3.petid  =  t2.petid where t3.pettype  =  'dog'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Fname FROM Student AS T1 JOIN Has_Pet AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID JOIN Pets AS T3 ON T2.PetID = T3.PetID WHERE T3.PetType = 'cat' INTERSECT SELECT T1.Fname FROM Student AS T1 JOIN Has_Pet AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID JOIN Pets AS T3 ON T2.PetID = T3.PetID WHERE T3.PetType = 'dog'

records.question: Which professionals have operated a treatment that costs less than the average? Give me theor first names and last names.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first_name ,  T1.last_name FROM Professionals AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 WHERE cost_of_treatment  <  ( SELECT avg(cost_of_treatment) FROM Treatments )
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM Professionals p
JOIN Treatments t ON p.professional_id = t.professional_id
WHERE t.cost_of_treatment < (SELECT AVG(cost_of_treatment) FROM Treatments)

records.question: What are the names of the countries with no car makers?

records.pred_sql: SELECT CountryName FROM countries WHERE CountryId NOT IN (SELECT Country FROM car_makers WHERE Country IS NOT NULL)

records.question: List the area codes in which voters voted both for the contestant 'Tabatha Gehling' and the contestant 'Kelly Clauss'.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T3.area_code FROM contestants AS T1 JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.contestant_number  =  T2.contestant_number JOIN area_code_state AS T3 ON T2.state  =  T3.state WHERE T1.contestant_name  =  'Tabatha Gehling' INTERSECT SELECT T3.area_code FROM contestants AS T1 JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.contestant_number  =  T2.contestant_number JOIN area_code_state AS T3 ON T2.state  =  T3.state WHERE T1.contestant_name  =  'Kelly Clauss'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT V1.area_code
FROM (SELECT VOTES.phone_number AS area_code, VOTES.contestant_number
      FROM VOTES
      JOIN CONTESTANTS ON VOTES.contestant_number = CONTESTANTS.contestant_number
      WHERE CONTESTANTS.contestant_name = 'Tabatha Gehling') AS V1
JOIN (SELECT VOTES.phone_number AS area_code, VOTES.contestant_number
      FROM VOTES
      JOIN CONTESTANTS ON VOTES.contestant_number = CONTESTANTS.contestant_number
      WHERE CONTESTANTS.contestant_name = 'Kelly Clauss') AS V2
ON V1.area_code = V2.area_code

records.question: Find the series name and country of the tv channel that is playing some cartoons directed by Ben Jones and Michael Chang?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.series_name ,  T1.country FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.directed_by  =  'Michael Chang' INTERSECT SELECT T1.series_name ,  T1.country FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.directed_by  =  'Ben Jones'

records.pred_sql: SELECT PetType, weight FROM Pets ORDER BY pet_age ASC LIMIT 1

records.question: What are the names of the dogs for which the owner has not spend more than 1000 for treatment ?
records.gold_sql: select name from dogs where dog_id not in ( select dog_id from treatments group by dog_id having sum(cost_of_treatment)  >  1000 )
records.pred_sql:
SELECT name FROM Dogs WHERE owner_id IN (
  SELECT o.owner_id FROM Owners o
  JOIN Dogs d ON d.owner_id = o.owner_id
  JOIN Treatments t ON t.dog_id = d.dog_id
  GROUP BY o.owner_id
  HAVING SUM(t.cost_of_treatment) <= 1000
)

records.question: What is the number of car models that are produced by each maker and what is the id and full name of each maker?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Count(*) ,  T2.FullName ,  T2.id FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id GROUP BY T2.id;
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cm.Id, cm.FullName, COUNT(ml.ModelId) AS num_models
FROM car_makers cm
JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
GROUP BY cm.Id, cm.FullName
